title: isoetes histrix f. longispina
intro: Isoetes histrix f. longispina is a type of aquatic plant, also known as quillwort or needle quillwort, which is a species of Isoetes found in North America. Traditionally, Isoetes histrix f. longispina has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isoetes histrix f. longispina are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to act as a diuretic and to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Isoetes histrix f. longispina can be made by drying and grinding the plant material, and it is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices.
